prediction.pre_match_note: Heavyweight Championship rematch. Fighter who won original fight now defending. Rematch modifier ×1.08 (adjustment signal — loser studies and adapts). Both made weight cleanly. Year-end event: UFC historically has high-quality main cards.

outcome.final_score: Challenger won by submission Round 4 (rematch reversal)

calibration_flags.notes: Rematch reversal confirmed — ×1.08 modifier for loser-adjusts correctly predicted direction change. Fighter who won the first fight lost the rematch (common pattern — loser has more motivation to adapt). Year-end event quality signal validated.
